IN VARITAS NAVIGATION (chartering) <chartering@varitasnavigation.com>
Subject:
SMX VSL - Open Jeddah 19/20 JAN
Fm: OndaChart
PLS PROPOSE SUITABLE CARGO FOR:
= M/V UNION GLORY = 55,088 / 10 =  JEDDAH, SAUDI ARABIA = 19/20 JAN
= VSL EX RECENT D/D IN TIP/TOP CONDITION
= GRAIN CLEAN
= FLEX TRADING / USA / GOA OK
M.V UNION GLORY
SDBC 55,088MT ON ABT 12.52M SSW, TPC 56.4MT
BUILT 2010 NACKS / FLAG SINGAPORE,CLASS NK
LOA 189.50 M / BEAM 32.26 M
G.R.T 30,962 / N.R.T 18,171
5 HOLDS/HATCHES
HATCH SIZE  1) 17.80 X 18.60M
2-5) 20.47 X 18.60M
GRAIN / BALE CAPA  69,451 CBM / 67,173 CBM
CO2 FITTED
CRANES 4X30.5 MT  + 4  GRABS (6-12CBM)
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION:
BALLAST ABT 12.5K ON ABT 21MT IFO + ABT 0.1MT MGO AT SEA
LADEN ABT 12.0K ON ABT 21.5MT IFO + ABT 0.1MT MGO AT SEA
IDLE ABT 3.0MT IFO + 0.1 MT LSMGO
WORKING ABT 5.0MT IFO + 0.1 MT LSMGO
BUNKER SPECIFICATIONS: ISO 8217 : 2017 (E) SPECS OR LATEST AMENDMENTS. RMG 380 FOR IFO AND DMA FOR MGO WITH SULPHUR CONTENT AS MANDATORY IN TRADING AREAS.  FUELS TO BE FREE OF ANY-ALL WASTE AUTOMOTIVE LUBRICANTS OR OTHER WASTE CHEMICALS.
VESSEL TO SWITCH OVER TO DESIGNATED FUELS BEFORE ARRIVAL INTO DESIGNATED ZONE WITH ADEQUATE TIME MARGIN AS PER VESSEL\'S SAFETY PROCEDURES.FUELS OF DIFFERENT GRADE / SUPPLIER TO BE STRICTLY SEPARATED BY VESSEL\'S TANKS. MIXING BUNKER IS NOT ALLOWED.
BIMCO FUEL SULPHUR CONTENT CLAUSE FOR TIME CHARTER PARTIES AS AMENDED FROM TIME TO TIME TO APPLY.
BIMCO BUNKER NON-LIEN CLAUSE TO APPLY.
VESSEL IS ENTITLED TO BURN MDO FOR MAIN ENGINE WHEN MANOEUVER IN/OUT OF PORTS/BERTHS/NARROW WATERS/CHANNELS/CANALS/RIVERS/ STRAITS / COASTAL WATERS/ADVERSE-BAD WEATHER/ ROUGH SEAS/ AND IN CASE OF SAFETY AND EMERGENCY.
SPEED / CONS ARE EFFECTIVE FOR VOYAGES EXCEEDING 48 HOURS TRANSIT TIME FROM SEA PILOT TO SEA PILOT.
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES IS GIVEN AND DETERMINED BASIS NO DECK CARGO AND GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS, NOT EXCEEDING WINDS BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3, WITH WAVE AND SWELL COMBINED HEIGHT NO TO EXCEED 1.25 MTRS AND NO ADVERSE INFLUENCE OF CURRENTS/SWELL IN 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS FROM NOON TO NOON AND ON EVEN KEEL IN DEEP WATERS WITH CLEAN BOTTOM, SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY, EXCLUDING CANALS, NARROW AND RESTRICTED WATERS AND PERIODS WHEN SPEED IS REDUCED DUE TO CHTRS\' ORDERS, REASONS OF SAFETY AND POOR VISIBILITY ETC.
SPEED IS NOT TO BE DEBITED DUE TO FAVORABLE CURRENTS, AND A CURRENT FACTOR IS NOT TO BE APPLIED TO INCREASE THE WARRANTED SPEED ON STEAMING DAYS DURING WHICH THE VESSEL EXPERIENCED FAVORABLE CURRENT.
ABOUT IS UNDERSTOOD TO MEAN 0.5 KNOT DOWNWARDS IN THE SPEED AND 5 UPWARDS IN THE CONSUMPTION.
NO EXTRAPOLATIONS OF ANY KIND PERMITTED. PERFORMANCE WARRANTY TO APPLY DURING PERIODS OF CONTRACTUAL GOOD WEATHER ONLY.
ALL DETAILS "ABOUT"
Best regards,
Alexey Kuznetsov
Onda Chartering & Shipping
